title: Junior Data Scientist
description: We are looking for a Junior Data Scientist to join our analytics team. You will work on predictive models, build dashboards, and derive insights from large datasets. Great opportunity for recent graduates.

title: Data Scientist - NLP Specialist
description: Join LangTech to build state-of-the-art NLP systems. You'll work on sentiment analysis, named entity recognition, and text classification using transformer models.

title: Senior Data Scientist
description: Lead data science initiatives, mentor junior team members, and build end-to-end ML pipelines. Must have strong experience with production ML systems.

title: Data Science Intern
description: Summer internship for aspiring data scientists. Work alongside senior data scientists on real projects involving predictive analytics and data exploration.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Design and deploy machine learning models at scale. Work on computer vision and NLP projects with cutting-edge architectures.

title: Business Data Analyst
description: Analyze sales data, create reports, and provide actionable insights. Work closely with business stakeholders to drive data-informed decisions.

title: Data Analyst Intern
description: Assist the analytics team with data cleaning, visualization, and reporting. Great exposure to financial data and business intelligence tools.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Build modern web applications using React and Node.js. Work on both frontend and backend, implement APIs, and deliver pixel-perfect UIs.

title: Frontend Developer Intern
description: Learn modern frontend development with React. You'll work on UI components, responsive layouts, and gain real-world project experience.

title: Backend Engineer
description: Design and build scalable backend systems using Python and microservice architecture. Handle millions of API requests daily.

title: Software Engineer - Entry Level
description: Join our engineering team to build enterprise solutions. Great mentorship program for fresh graduates. Work with modern tech stack.

title: Software Development Intern
description: Summer internship building mobile and web applications. Exposure to agile development, code reviews, and continuous deployment.

title: HR Generalist
description: Manage employee relations, onboarding, and HR compliance. Partner with leadership to create positive workplace culture.

title: Talent Acquisition Specialist
description: Lead full-cycle recruiting efforts. Source candidates, conduct interviews, and manage the hiring pipeline using modern ATS tools.

title: HR Intern
description: Support the HR team with administrative tasks, employee onboarding, and learn about HR compliance, benefits administration, and talent management.

title: Compensation & Benefits Manager
description: Design and manage compensation programs, benefits packages, and ensure compliance with labor laws and regulations.

title: Financial Analyst
description: Perform financial modeling, analyze investment opportunities, and create forecasts. Strong Excel and analytical skills required.

title: Finance Intern
description: Support the finance team with research, data entry, and financial reporting. Excellent opportunity to learn investment analysis.

title: Senior Accountant
description: Manage financial reporting, ensure GAAP compliance, and lead the month-end close process. CPA preferred.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description: Manage SEO/SEM campaigns, social media strategy, and email marketing. Analyze campaign performance and optimize ROI.

title: Marketing Intern
description: Assist with social media content creation, campaign analytics, and market research. Learn digital marketing tools and strategies.

title: Content Marketing Manager
description: Lead content strategy across all channels. Create compelling blog posts, whitepapers, and social media content to drive brand awareness.

title: Business Development Representative
description: Generate leads, build client relationships, and close deals. Use CRM tools to track pipeline and meet quarterly targets.

title: Sales Intern
description: Learn the fundamentals of B2B sales. Shadow senior sales reps, conduct market research, and help manage the CRM database.

title: UX/UI Designer
description: Create user-centered designs for web and mobile apps. Conduct user research, build wireframes, and deliver high-fidelity prototypes in Figma.

title: Graphic Design Intern
description: Work with the creative team on brand assets, social media graphics, and marketing materials. Learn industry-standard design tools.

title: Product Designer
description: Own the design process from research to delivery. Work closely with engineers and PMs to ship polished product features.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines, manage cloud infrastructure, and ensure system reliability. Experience with containerization required.

title: Cloud Engineer Intern
description: Learn cloud infrastructure management. Assist with AWS deployments, container orchestration, and monitoring setup.

title: Site Reliability Engineer
description: Ensure 99.99% uptime for critical systems. Implement monitoring, incident response, and infrastructure automation.

title: Network Engineer
description: Configure and maintain enterprise networks. Implement security protocols and monitor network performance for a Fortune 500 client base.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst Intern
description: Assist the security team with vulnerability assessments, security monitoring, and incident analysis. Learn real-world cybersecurity practices.

title: Technical Project Manager
description: Lead cross-functional teams to deliver software projects on time. Use Agile/Scrum methodology and manage stakeholder expectations.

title: Project Coordinator Intern
description: Support project managers with scheduling, documentation, and team coordination. Learn project management tools and methodologies.

title: Healthcare Data Analyst
description: Analyze patient data, build clinical dashboards, and support healthcare quality improvement initiatives. HIPAA knowledge required.

title: Clinical Research Intern
description: Assist with clinical trial data collection, patient recruitment, and regulatory documentation. Exposure to healthcare research methodology.

title: Mechanical Design Engineer
description: Design mechanical components using CAD/SolidWorks, perform stress analysis, and collaborate with manufacturing teams.

title: Mechanical Engineering Intern
description: Work on mechanical design projects, assist with testing and prototyping, and learn professional engineering practices.

title: Electrical Design Engineer
description: Design circuit boards, embedded systems, and power electronics. Work with cross-functional teams on IoT product development.

title: Embedded Systems Intern
description: Work on embedded firmware development for IoT sensors. Learn real-time programming and hardware-software integration.

title: Civil Engineer
description: Design structural systems, manage construction projects, and ensure compliance with building codes and safety standards.

title: Civil Engineering Intern
description: Assist licensed engineers with site surveys, structural calculations, and CAD drawings. Hands-on construction project experience.

title: Automation Test Engineer
description: Design and implement automated test frameworks for web and API testing. Ensure software quality through comprehensive test coverage.

title: QA Automation Intern
description: Learn automated testing practices. Write test scripts, participate in sprint reviews, and gain exposure to CI/CD pipelines.

title: Database Administrator
description: Manage and optimize database systems across production environments. Ensure data security, availability, and performance.

title: Database Intern
description: Learn database administration and optimization. Assist with data migration projects and SQL query performance tuning.

title: Big Data Engineer
description: Build and maintain big data processing pipelines using Hadoop, Spark, and Kafka. Process terabytes of data for real-time analytics.

title: Data Engineering Intern
description: Work on data pipeline development using Spark and Kafka. Learn distributed computing and big data ecosystem.

title: Java Developer
description: Build enterprise Java applications using Spring Boot and microservices architecture. Strong OOP and design patterns required.

title: Java Developer Intern
description: Develop Java-based web applications. Learn Spring Boot, RESTful APIs, and modern enterprise development practices.

title: .NET Developer
description: Build enterprise applications using C# and .NET. Work on web APIs, database integration, and Azure cloud deployment.

title: Python Developer
description: Build Python-based microservices and automation tools. Work with FastAPI, Django or Flask for web backend development.

title: Python Automation Engineer
description: Build automation scripts and data processing pipelines using Python. Streamline business workflows and integrate with cloud services.

title: SAP Consultant
description: Implement and customize SAP modules for enterprise clients. Strong understanding of business processes and ERP systems required.

title: Operations Manager
description: Oversee daily operations, optimize processes, and manage cross-functional teams. Drive operational efficiency and cost reduction.

title: Operations Intern
description: Support operations team with process documentation, data entry, and efficiency analysis. Learn supply chain and operations management.

title: EdTech Content Developer
description: Create engaging educational content for online learning platforms. Develop curriculum, assessments, and interactive learning modules.

title: Teaching Assistant Intern
description: Assist lead instructors in teaching programming courses. Help students debug code, grade assignments, and create tutorial content.

title: Advertising Coordinator
description: Coordinate advertising campaigns across digital and print channels. Manage client relationships and track campaign performance.

title: Business Consultant
description: Advise clients on strategic initiatives, process improvement, and digital transformation. Strong analytical and communication skills required.

title: Business Analyst Intern
description: Support senior consultants with market research, data analysis, and presentation creation. Learn consulting frameworks and business strategy.

title: Restaurant Manager
description: Manage daily restaurant operations, staff scheduling, inventory, and customer experience. Leadership in a fast-paced environment.

title: Aerospace Engineer
description: Design and test aerospace components and systems. Work on propulsion, aerodynamics, and structural analysis for commercial aircraft.

title: Aerospace Engineering Intern
description: Assist engineers with aerodynamic simulations, CAD modeling, and wind tunnel testing. Gain hands-on aerospace industry experience.

title: Banking Associate
description: Manage client portfolios, process financial transactions, and provide investment advisory services. Strong financial acumen required.

title: Banking Intern
description: Rotate across banking divisions including retail, commercial, and investment banking. Learn financial analysis and client management.

title: Operations Analyst - BPO
description: Analyze operational metrics, optimize workflows, and improve service delivery in a business process outsourcing environment.

title: Management Consultant
description: Drive strategic initiatives for Fortune 500 clients. Lead project workstreams, conduct market analysis, and present recommendations to C-suite.

title: Consulting Intern
description: Support consulting teams with research, analysis, and deliverable creation. Exposure to multiple industries and business challenges.

title: Wellness Program Coordinator
description: Design and manage corporate wellness programs. Coordinate fitness activities, nutrition workshops, and mental health initiatives.

title: Public Relations Specialist
description: Manage media relations, write press releases, and develop PR strategies. Build and maintain relationships with journalists and influencers.

title: PR Intern
description: Assist with media outreach, event coordination, and social media management. Learn professional communication and brand management.

title: AI Research Scientist
description: Conduct cutting-edge AI research in deep learning and generative AI. Publish papers, develop novel architectures, and push the boundaries of AI.

title: AI/ML Intern
description: Work on real AI projects including model training, data preprocessing, and evaluation. Mentorship from senior ML engineers.

title: Cloud Solutions Architect
description: Design cloud architectures for enterprise clients. Migrate on-premise systems to cloud, optimize costs, and ensure security compliance.

title: React Frontend Engineer
description: Build responsive, accessible web applications using React and TypeScript. Create reusable component libraries and implement modern UI patterns.

title: Mobile App Developer
description: Develop cross-platform mobile applications. Build beautiful, performant apps for iOS and Android with great user experience.

title: Mobile Development Intern
description: Learn mobile app development and contribute to real app features. Work with React Native or Flutter under senior developer mentorship.

title: Data Engineer
description: Build reliable data pipelines using Airflow and dbt. Design data warehouse schemas and ensure data quality across the organization.

title: ETL Developer Intern
description: Assist with ETL pipeline development and data warehouse maintenance. Learn data engineering best practices and SQL optimization.

title: Blockchain Developer
description: Develop smart contracts and decentralized applications. Work with Solidity, Ethereum, and Web3 technologies to build the future of finance.

title: Blockchain Intern
description: Learn blockchain development fundamentals. Work on smart contract testing, DApp frontend development, and Web3 integration.

title: Software Test Engineer
description: Design and execute test plans for enterprise software. Write automated tests, perform regression testing, and ensure product quality.

title: QA Testing Intern
description: Learn software testing methodologies including manual and automated testing. Write test cases and report bugs in an Agile environment.

title: Generative AI Engineer
description: Build and deploy LLM-powered applications. Work with prompt engineering, RAG pipelines, and fine-tuning foundation models for enterprise use cases.

title: AI Product Intern
description: Help build AI-powered products using LLMs and generative AI. Prototype new features, evaluate model outputs, and contribute to product roadmap.

title: Computer Vision Engineer
description: Develop computer vision models for autonomous systems. Work on object detection, image segmentation, and 3D reconstruction.
